description: Narrative-to-canonical promotion audit. Facts that appear clearly in 02_reader_report.md or 08_final_report.md but were not originally present as typed fields in 05_canonical.json / 09_final_canonical.json / 12_canonical_enriched_v2.json. These are promoted into canonical via the patch at the bottom of this file.

promoted_facts.fact: Franchisor parent-royalty mechanic: McDonald's USA, LLC pays McDonald's Corporation a 2% royalty on Company-owned AND franchised restaurant sales for IP license rights.
promoted_facts.source: RT_depth_financial_notes.json / Exhibit A Related Party Transactions note

promoted_facts.fact: Franchised revenue breakdown 2024: Rents $5,170.7M + Royalties $2,014.5M + Initial fees $25.4M = $7,210.6M. Rent is 71.7% of franchised revenue, not royalty.

Future minimum rent payments owed TO the franchisor by franchisees under existing conventional franchise arrangements total $14,159.0M: Owned sites $8,349.0M + Leased sites $5,810.0M. This is an ~13x multiple of single-year franchised rent revenue.
Subsequent event: $2.4B of parent payable arrangements matured on Feb 17, 2025 and were converted to equity. This wipes out most of the Due-to-parent balance AFTER the 12/31/2024 balance sheet date.
Dividend policy: 100% of net income is upstreamed annually to parent. Retained earnings have been held constant at $4,633.9M since at least 1/1/2022.
promoted_facts.source: RT_depth_financial_notes.json / Exhibit A members' equity statement

promoted_facts.fact: Full-state list of Exhibit T addenda: California, Hawaii, Maryland, Minnesota, North Dakota, Washington. NO Wisconsin addendum despite WI being the state of filing.
Washington Assurance of Discontinuance with Washington AG: franchisor agreed to remove no-hire/no-poach provisions from form FA and not enforce them in existing agreements. No monetary penalty.
2024 effective rent range for franchised restaurants: 0.00% to 33.33% of sales. At the high end, rent alone would consume the entire pro forma OIBO of $734K–$879K.
Item 7 Note 11 disclosure: 9 of 31 McOpCo sales in 2024 exceeded the published high end of the traditional initial investment range, by $65,593 to $2,035,816.

Confidentiality/gag clauses exist: Item 20 explicitly notes that in some instances current and former franchisees sign provisions restricting their ability to speak openly about their experience with McDonald's.
NOA (National Owners Association) is the only independent franchisee association listed — not endorsed by McDonald's but requested inclusion.
Weighted average remaining lease term: 17 years (operating), 28 years (finance). Weighted average discount rate: 4.4% (operating), 4.1% (finance).
Restructuring initiative ('Accelerating the Organization') incurred $63.6M total charges since 2023 inception; $1.2M incurred in FY2024; $4.4M accrued balance at 12/31/2024.
Unrecognized tax benefits $75.8M at 12/31/2024 (up from $70.6M at 12/31/2023). IRS/state exams open for tax years 2009 and later.

Property and equipment cost breakdown: Land $4,167.2M (19.5%) + Buildings on owned land $12,096.1M (56.4%) + Buildings on leased land $5,666.7M (26.4%) + Equipment/signs/seating $923.6M (4.3%) + Other $67.5M. Real estate is the asset base; equipment is a thin layer.
Effective income tax rate 2024: 23.2%. Current tax $1,033.3M + deferred $11.6M = $1,044.9M provision.
Asset transfer from parent at Company formation (1/1/2005): $5,548.8M net of liabilities.
Parent retains legal title to certain property and equipment assets used by the Company under extended intercompany agreements. Parent also owns or licenses the U.S. intellectual property rights.

facts_NOT_promoted: State-level transfer counts for 2022-2024 — rejected as too granular for canonical; preserved in page text
Full Item 2 officer start dates — structural reference only
Individual concluded-case settlement amounts beyond the top 5 — preserved in reader report narrative
